tasks.subject: Task 0: Wire nix-config as committed ci flake input
tasks.description: Add github:sini/nix-config ci input (rev-locked); thread denFleet={nixConfig=inputs.nix-config} specialArg. Verify it exposes .inputs (both channels) + .outPath.

metadata.verifyCommand: cd ci && nix flake lock && nix flake check
acceptanceCriteria: inputs.nix-config exposes .inputs (nixpkgs-unstable 567a49d + nixpkgs-master 5e8ca42) + .outPath; 39 tests green; nixpkgs stays 567a49d

tasks.subject: Task 1: den-fleet fixture + runDenFleet + bitstream gate
tasks.description: lib/corpus/den-fleet.nix (mk) + adapter.{fleetEngineLib, runDenFleet} CHANNEL-SEEDED (runDenFleet doctor: fx; doctor=channelLib->lib; vanilla=identity=host REAL build; engine=fleetEngineLib=import ./engine {lib=channelLib}).engine.lib; lazy self=out//{outPath;sourceInfo}) + register denFleet + ci/tests/den-fleet-parity.nix (bitstream gate: a=runDenFleet (l:l); b=runDenFleet fleetEngineLib + channel-modules-identity guard).

acceptanceCriteria: runDenFleet is channel-seeded (doctor: channelLib->lib); vanilla=(l:l) reproduces host REAL build; engine=fleetEngineLib (engine on the channel lib)
channel-modules-identity: vendored modules.nix == both nixpkgs-unstable AND nixpkgs-master lib/modules.nix
nix flake check green 39->41; self-knot carries outPath (bare self=out throws)

tasks.subject: Task 2: blade gate (master channel)
tasks.description: Add blade fixture (channelInput=nixpkgs-master, host=blade) + test to den-fleet-parity.nix.

tasks.subject: Task 3: cortex gate (master channel + microvm)
tasks.description: Add cortex fixture (channelInput=nixpkgs-master, host=cortex) + test. cortex's microvm guest is the genuine open risk; if it diverges, report finding, do NOT silence.

acceptanceCriteria: if cortex diverges (microvm sub-eval): report finding, do NOT silence/fudge expected
